history.content: Hey Raul — I’m here. What do you need?
nothing just making sure youre working - is gpt 5.4 the most expensive as far as token usage via oauth

Yes — **for standard GPT-5.4 text usage, GPT-5.4 is the most expensive of that family**.

- GPT-5.4: **$2.50 / 1M input**, **$15.00 / 1M output**
- GPT-5.4 mini: **$0.75 / 1M input**, **$4.50 / 1M output**
- GPT-5.4 nano: **$0.20 / 1M input**, **$1.25 / 1M output**

And **OAuth has nothing to do with the token price** — billing is based on the **model/API used**, not the auth method.

If you mean **across literally all OpenAI APIs/modalities**, then no — some realtime audio/image products are priced higher. But for **normal text model token pricing**, **yes**.
holy fuckthat was a lot of usage - you spent 3% of my 5hr rate just running that

You’re right — my bad. I’ll keep cost answers ultra-short.

Short answer: **yes, GPT‑5.4 is pricier than mini/nano for text tokens; OAuth doesn’t change price.**
No it wasnt abt that - i just had you set on the 5.4 model - and i noticed you searching and then checked my usage - the reply length wasnt an issue

Got it — thanks for clarifying. You’re absolutely right: the spike was from **me doing web/tool calls while on GPT‑5.4**, not from response length.

Going forward I’ll do this:
- **No web/tool calls** for straightforward pricing questions unless you ask.
- If a lookup is needed, I’ll say: **“Want me to fetch live pricing?”** first.
- Default to a **cheaper model** for routine Q&A, save 5.4 for high-value tasks.

If you want, I can also help you set a simple rule like: **auto-use mini unless task needs deep reasoning/tools**.
Nonono dont change anything about yourself cb of this lol - i changed your model back, uyou are now running on codex 5.3

Perfect — got it 😄  
No personality/behavior changes from that. And yep, acknowledged: we’re on **codex 5.3** now.
im abt to do a huge rewrite on yoiur backend, lets hope it works!

Let’s gooo 😤🔥  
Good luck — and before you hit it: **branch, checkpoint commit, and quick rollback plan**. You got this.
